title.rendered: Lawrenceburg Girls Hoops Raises $4K for Joe Burrow Foundation

content.rendered:
The Lawrenceburg High School girls basketball program recently demonstrated the power of community by hosting its fifth annual “Hooping for Hope” fundraiser. Held on Saturday, January 17, against Beechwood High School, the event raised nearly $4,000 to support the Joe Burrow Foundation.

Scoring Big for Youth Mental Health

Joe Burrow and the Foundation contributed to the day’s success by donating:

  • Custom Cleats worn by Joe Burrow
  • An autographed football
  • A curated Joe Burrow Foundation Gift Basket

A Community Celebration

Beyond the varsity matchup, the day was packed with family-friendly activities, including a Youth Day for K-8th graders and a free photo booth provided by Martinez and West Orthodontics. Local partners like Candles by Jordan, Bridges Counseling, and Family Services were also onsite to provide wellness resources and support.

The high-stakes raffle featured an impressive lineup of items from local legends and professional stars:

  • Sports Memorabilia: Items from Olympian Mason Parris, a Lauren Hill jersey, an Ashton Craig autographed sign, and a Noah Knigga signed jersey.
  • Pro Gear: Tee Higgins autographed cleats, Cincinnati Bengals gear, and tickets for the Cincinnati Reds and Cincinnati Cyclones.
  • LHS Pride: Framed aerial photos of the high school football field, a 2026-2027 LHS Athletic Pass, and a state patch football jersey.
  • Local Support: Gift cards for LA Nails and various Lawrenceburg businesses.

Five Years of Impact

Over the last five years, the Lawrenceburg Lady Tigers have raised nearly $15,000 through “Hooping for Hope,” consistently supporting local organizations and making a tangible difference in the lives of those in need.

Help Us “Do Good”

The Joe Burrow Foundation relies on the generosity of supporters like the Lawrenceburg community to fund critical programs like the Burrow Blueprint, which integrates mental health care into schools.

Join the team and make a difference today:

  • Click here to donate to the Joe Burrow Foundation to support teen mental health and hunger relief.
  • Follow the Foundation on social media on Instagram and Facebook.
  • Enter your email address below and click “Submit” to sign up for the JBF Newsletter to stay updated on upcoming events and initiatives.
